audience: SMEs and independent businesses that need clearly scoped technical maintenance without an internal web team.
primaryDutchSearchIntent: Planmatig website-onderhoud vinden voor updates, back-ups, technische controles en afgesproken wijzigingen met duidelijke verantwoordelijkheden.

searchIntent.question: Who can maintain our business website with a clear scope for updates, backups, checks and incident follow-up?
searchIntent.geographicContext: Limburg, Belgium, with remote service across Flanders, Antwerp and Dutch Limburg.

directAnswer: Website maintenance provides planned updates, backup checks, functional testing and technical issue follow-up within an agreed scope, while keeping new development and external-provider responsibilities clearly separate.
title: Website Maintenance for SMEs in Limburg | VisualVibe
metaDescription: Need website maintenance for updates, backups and technical checks? VisualVibe provides planned support with clear tasks and responsibilities for SMEs.
h1: Website maintenance with clear technical responsibilities
factsToPreserve: The technical baseline determines whether routine maintenance is possible or separate stabilisation is required first.
A maintenance agreement is not an unlimited help desk and new pages, redesigns and complex features remain separate projects.
No provider can guarantee complete website security.
Hosting, accounts, external services and user behaviour remain separate parts of the security and responsibility chain.
Response terms depend on the maintenance plan and recovery time can depend on third parties and technical complexity.
